title: Tangy Smoky Moroccan Chicken Tagine
description: A smoky and tangy Moroccan dish featuring chicken cooked in a flavorful tagine with black cardamom pods, served with fry grind rice and wrapped in a ti leaf.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until it is browned on all sides and cooked through.
Add the black cardamom pods, ground cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the tagine for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
While the tagine is simmering, prepare the ti leaf wraps by cutting the leaves into large squares.
To assemble the dish, place a portion of the cooked fry grind rice onto a ti leaf square, followed by a portion of the chicken tagine.
Fold the ti leaf over the filling to form a packet and serve immediately.
